hero.subtitle: Language integration for professionals who are tired of being treated like tourists in their own city.

philosophy.body: Most courses teach you how to pass an exam. We teach you how to handle a doctor's appointment, argue with a landlord, and make friends at a bar.

items.title: Context over Grammar
items.text: We don't just drill cases. We simulate real-life scenarios—bureaucracy, medical visits, social events—so you're ready when they actually happen.

items.title: Cultural Fluency
items.text: Speaking Czech isn't just about words. It's about knowing the unwritten rules of the society. When to be formal, when to push back, and when to joke.

items.title: Community First
items.text: Isolation is the enemy of integration. Our students become a network. We organize hikes, coffees, and events to keep you connected.

leadMagnet.description1: Most courses teach you grammar tables. Locals don't speak in tables.
leadMagnet.description2: Download our "Natural Czech Cheat Sheet": 50 essential phrases to soften requests, fill pauses, and sound like you actually live here.

form.label: Work Email
form.disclaimer: We respect your inbox. Unsubscribe at any time.

toasts.success: Thanks! Check your inbox for the cheat sheet.
toasts.fallback: Email draft opened. Send it to receive the cheat sheet.
toasts.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

mailto.subject: Natural Czech Cheat Sheet
mailto.body: Please send the cheat sheet to {{email}}

cookieConsent.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve the site and analyze traffic. Some are essential, others optional.

sections.heading: Data Controller
paragraphs: Jazyk a Integrace s.r.o., IČO: 23812036, Černomořská 384/9, Praha 10.
Registered under Sp. zn. C 433136 vedená u Městského soudu v Praze.
Contact: jazykaintegrace@gmail.com, +420 601 177 208.

sections.heading: Personal Data We Process
paragraphs: We process only the data you provide or that is necessary to deliver our services.
list: Course interests, attendance, and messages you send us.
Billing and payment details for enrolled students.
Technical data such as IP address, device type, and consent status.

sections.heading: Legal Bases (GDPR)
paragraphs: We rely on the following legal bases under the GDPR:
list: Performance of a contract when you enroll in a course.
Consent when you request a free resource or updates.
Legitimate interest to protect and improve the site.
Legal obligation for accounting and tax records.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Data
paragraphs: We use your data to provide and improve our services.
list: Respond to inquiries and deliver requested resources.
Manage enrollment, attendance, and course delivery.
Send updates only when you opt in.
Prevent abuse, maintain security, and improve performance.

sections.heading: Cookies & Local Storage
paragraphs: We use essential cookies and local storage to remember consent and language preferences.
list: Essential: required for site functionality and consent preferences.
Analytics: only used if you explicitly opt in.

sections.heading: Sharing and Processors
paragraphs: We do not sell personal data. We may share it with trusted providers that help us run the site and deliver services (email, forms, payments, hosting).
These providers process data under contracts and only for the purposes we specify.

sections.heading: Retention
paragraphs: Inquiry data is kept for up to 24 months unless you request deletion.
Course and billing records are retained as required by applicable law.

sections.heading: Your Rights
paragraphs: You can request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability, or object to processing.
You can withdraw consent at any time and lodge a complaint with the Czech Data Protection Authority (UOOU).

sections.heading: Company Details
paragraphs: Jazyk a Integrace s.r.o., IČO: 23812036.
Registered office: Černomořská 384/9, Praha 10.
Company register: Sp. zn. C 433136 vedená u Městského soudu v Praze.
Contact: jazykaintegrace@gmail.com, +420 601 177 208.

sections.heading: Website Use
paragraphs: By using this site, you agree not to misuse it or attempt to disrupt its operation.
We may update or change the content and availability of the site at any time.

sections.heading: Course Enrollment
paragraphs: Course details, pricing, and schedules are confirmed in your enrollment confirmation or invoice.
A place in a course is reserved after payment is received unless stated otherwise.

sections.heading: Cancellations and Changes
paragraphs: If you need to cancel or reschedule, contact us as early as possible. We will try to accommodate changes based on availability.
Specific refund or transfer terms are provided in your enrollment confirmation.

sections.heading: Materials and Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All course materials and content on this site are owned by Jazyk a Integrace s.r.o. unless stated otherwise.
You may not copy, resell, or distribute materials without written permission.

sections.heading: Liability
paragraphs: We strive to provide accurate information, but the site and services are provided "as is" without guarantees.
To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

sections.heading: Governing Law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of the Czech Republic.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to make the website work and improve your experience.

sections.heading: Cookies We Use
paragraphs: We keep cookie use minimal and rely on essential cookies by default.
list: Essential cookies: required for core functionality and consent preferences.
Analytics cookies: only used if you explicitly opt in.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
paragraphs: You can change your preferences in the cookie banner and via your browser settings.
Blocking essential cookies may impact site functionality.

sections.heading: Retention
paragraphs: Consent and preference cookies are stored for up to 12 months unless you clear them earlier.

sections.heading: Our Commitment
paragraphs: We are committed to making this website accessible to as many people as possible, regardless of ability.
We aim to follow WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines and continuously improve usability.

sections.heading: Feedback
paragraphs: If you experience accessibility issues or need assistance, contact us at jazykaintegrace@gmail.com.
We will do our best to respond quickly and provide an alternative way to access the information.
